name: Cursed by a succubus.
description:
And now stuck traveling the multiverse with her.

Fuantei has chosen you as a test subject to put you in a kaleidoscope of infinite worlds. An excellent opportunity to experience all kinds of lives and bodies. Literally all of them, for you will remain here forever.

Unless you can outsmart your enemy.

I have yet to figure out what format is best to use in a sandbox like this. I've tried using third person, but it just reads weird. Telling the bot to switch to feminine pronouns after a certain point is an option, but could create comprehension difficulties for the AI. Also, DeepSeek switches from third to second person very easily. So easily, in fact, that it does when you don't ask it to. Makes you wonder.

So let me introduce you to the newest breakthrough - second person past tense. Doesn't lobotomize the bot while still allowing gender shenanigans. Feel free to post your thoughts on this in the comments.

Also, the free DeepSeek on OpenRouter has been nearly impossible to use lately and it's apparently only going to get worse from here. If you have solutions for this besides waiting for my country to be able to make international payments, please leave a comment.
creator: icyicecold
